title: versioning — retention windows
description: ApiVersion + DeprecationNotice rows are lifecycle records — kept indefinitely for regulatory evidence + platform archaeology. Only soft-deleted drafts are hard-purged after a short window.
compliance_regimes_referenced: gdpr Art. 5 (storage limitation — lifecycle records justify long retention)
gdpr Art. 30 (records of processing — API version history is evidence)
soc2 CC7.3 (system operations — change management records)
rfc 8594 (Sunset header — published notices are audit trail)

hot.description: Every non-sunset version stays hot indefinitely — registry lookups need it.

cold.description: Sunset versions retained forever as archaeological records. Rows are read-only + not indexed for search.

hot.description: Published notices stay hot for tenant catalog + Link header emitter.

cold.description: Archived notices retained forever — regulatory trail proving customers were notified before sunset.
7 year cold retention. Change management evidence for SOC 2 CC8.1.

compliance_tier_inheritance.note: Fields classified in foundation's 8-tier taxonomy via data-classes.json.
